commit.message:
Fix: don't set unconnected external signer on app restart

When an Amber user's profile is loaded from DB on restart, the
ExternalSignerService instance is fresh and unconnected. Setting it
as the signer cleared the previous state. Now only sets the signer
when it's actually connected.

  request as unauthenticated instead of crashing with 404

commit.message:
feat: add Sustained Performance Mode toggle

- ComponentManagerActivity: adds ⚡ Sustained Perf: ON/OFF as index-0
  item in the component list. Tapping toggles bh_prefs/sustained_perf
  boolean and shows a toast. All existing list items shifted by 1
  (Add New = index 1, components = index 2+).
- WineActivity.onCreate(): after existing perf block, reads
  bh_prefs/sustained_perf and calls window.setSustainedPerformanceMode(true)
  if enabled. API 24 guard included.

Non-root approach — no sysfs writes. Prevents thermal throttling from
dropping GPU/CPU clocks during prolonged gaming sessions.

commit.message:
fix: rename middleware.ts to proxy.ts for Next.js 16 compatibility

Next.js 16 deprecated the 'middleware' file convention in favour of
'proxy'. On Vercel's Edge runtime, middleware.ts no longer executes
reliably under Next.js 16, causing MIDDLEWARE_INVOCATION_FAILED on
every request. Renaming to proxy.ts resolves the runtime crash.
Logic and imports are unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
docs: FF check at typechecking level, not execution level

No regression: when FF is off, origination fails at typechecking
(same as before our MR). The flag is passed as allow_address_indexing
parameter to typecheck_script. Kernel reads ExperimentalFeatures
once at boot and passes it through.

fix: remove nonexistent /public/workflows proxy (#142)

* feat: replace leaderboard with workflow proxy routes (ranked, best, public)

Remove the composite /stats/leaderboard endpoint and performance.ts.
All workflow stats are now handled by workflow-service — api-service
is a pure proxy.

New routes:
- GET /v1/workflows/ranked → workflow-service /workflows/ranked
- GET /v1/workflows/best → workflow-service /workflows/best (hero records)
- GET /v1/public/workflows → public list (no auth)
- GET /v1/public/workflows/ranked → public ranked (no auth)
- GET /v1/public/workflows/best → public hero records (no auth)

Both ranked and best support ?by=brand for brand-level stats/heroes,
and ?groupBy=section|brand for grouped results.

commit.message:
Hide newly correct word tiles until their flip animation fires

Previously, correct letters appeared green instantly in the word display
when a guess was dispatched, then the flip animation played over them.
Now they stay dark (matching unrevealed tiles) during the guess row
animation, then flip in one-by-one once the guess row finishes.

Fix double-tap to switch to target VS Code window

Double-tap on floating panel card now:
- AXRaise the specific window by title match
- Set as main window (kAXMainAttribute)
- activateIgnoringOtherApps to force switch even from browser

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Upload host.list to controller in diagnostic script

Write worker IPs in fio hostfile format (IP,PORT per line) to
/tmp/host.list on the controller VM.  The diagnostic Python script
reads from the file instead of receiving IPs as argv.  After diagnosis
completes, the host.list remains on the controller so the user can
test fio directly: fio --client=/tmp/host.list job.fio

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Guillaume Boutry <guillaume.boutry@canonical.com>

fix: update claim approval trigger to use renamed role values

The sync_claim_approval trigger still used old role names ('artist',
'venue_owner') after they were renamed to 'artist_manager' and
'venue_manager' in migration 20260317_04, causing profiles_role_check
constraint violations when approving claims.

commit.message:
refactor: 12 code quality and performance improvements

- validateMediaCounts: extract shared media validation to utils.ts
- checkDailyPostLimit: Redis INCR/EXPIRE for atomic TOCTOU-safe counting
- safeBigIntToNumber: prevent bigint->number precision loss in admin stats
- getGenres: add unstable_cache (1h TTL)
- contact.ts: unstable_cache + full ActionResult migration
- scheduled-post.ts: ActionResult migration + Promise.allSettled batch
- pesticide.ts: replace deep nested include with select
- layout.tsx: replace img with Image, wrap RightSidebar in Suspense

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor(cmd): replace global rootCmd/configCmd with factory functions (TDD-R3 Item 10)

Replace package-level var rootCmd, var configCmd, var configShowCmd, var vmName and
both init() registration functions with newRootCmd(version) and newConfigCmd() factories.

Each test now receives a fresh isolated command tree via newRootCmd("test") — no shared
state between tests, no teardown cleanup required. vmName is read directly from the
cobra flag at call time rather than via a global variable.

Also fix two pre-existing violations found during code review:
- cache.go: filepath.Join instead of string concatenation for path construction
- config.go: GetString("vm") error now checked and returned

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Convert 3 navbar links into popup modals with feature descriptions and
CTAs. Fix Precos link to use absolute path (/#precos) for subpage nav.

feat: port dr3-old learnings — conformance tests, pathfinding heap, component guard

(retreat, unit restrictions), leaders (fate outcomes, determinism), and
sieges (breakout, plunder, sortie). Replace O(n) pathfinding priority
queue with O(log n) binary min-heap. Add ESLint max-lines (400) guard
for .tsx files. Extend engine with retreat state, combat strength, and
leader fate outcome pure functions. Document architectural decisions
reinforced by dr3-old analysis and add self-improve loop to workflow.

commit.message:
Phase 2: Fix 3 high-priority quick wins (H3, H5, H7) (#135)

* Phase 2: Fix 3 high-priority quick wins (H3, H5, H7)

H3: Replace Date.now() IDs with crypto.randomUUID() across 7 slices to
prevent ID collisions when actions fire in the same millisecond.
Fixes #131

H5: Add maxLength and input sanitisation to user text inputs — player
names (20), justifications (200), confessions (500 existed), number
inputs (min/max bounds). Trim text on submit.
Fixes #132

H7: Fix cross-slice state mutation — add clearDenouncements() action to
tribunalSlice and call via get() from diceSlice.incrementRound instead
of directly mutating tribunal state with set().
Fixes #133

Tests: 1036 pass (+11 new), lint clean, build clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix: Delete phase plan and add gitignore and CLAUDE.md updates

* Fix: spelling

commit.message:
feat(orchestrator): 멀티트랙 병렬 분배 + SendMessage 보정 + 스킬 네이밍 통일

### 스킬 네이밍
- 모든 SKILL.md name 필드에 consensus-loop: 접두사 추가
  orchestrator → consensus-loop:orchestrator
  implementer → consensus-loop:implementer
  verify-implementation → consensus-loop:verify
  merge-worktree → consensus-loop:merge
  planner → consensus-loop:planner
  consensus-loop → consensus-loop:guide

### 오케스트레이터 프로토콜
- Agent Registry: 핸드오프에 agent_id/worktree_path/worktree_branch 추적
- SendMessage 보정: [계류] 시 기존 에이전트에 SendMessage (새 Agent 스폰 금지)
- 멀티트랙 병렬 분배: 비중복 스코프 검증 후 최대 3 동시 워커
- 보정 판단 기준 테이블 추가

### 문서
- README.md, docs/ko/, docs/en/ 모든 스킬 참조 업데이트
- agents/implementer.md에 Correction Rounds 섹션 추가
- 멀티 에이전트 라이프사이클 다이어그램 병렬 트랙으로 갱신

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Security fixes, DMG builder, double-tap to expand

Security:
- Move IPC files from /tmp to ~/Library/Application Support/Canopy/ipc
  with 0700 directory and 0600 file permissions
- Fix allow-rule matching: use word-boundary matching instead of substring
- Remove debug log file (/tmp/canopy-debug.log)
- Remove unused canopyIsActive variable

Features:
- create-dmg.sh: builds release, signs, creates DMG with Applications symlink
- Double-tap window card in floating panel → expands to main Canopy window

commit.message:
Revert runner field from compute_affected_sublibraries.jl

The runner field change broke sublibrary detection because
sort(collect(groups)) fails when values are Dict instead of Vector
(no isless method for Dict). Revert to original {group, version}
matrix format. Runner field infrastructure will be added in a
separate PR.

Co-Authored-By: Chris Rackauckas <accounts@chrisrackauckas.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add async NIP-44 + signer-aware Gift Wrap for Amber phase 1

Enable Welcome message send/receive with NIP-46 remote signers (Amber) by:
- Adding async Nip44EncryptAsync/Nip44DecryptAsync to INostrService that
  delegate to external signer when connected, otherwise use local key
- Making CreateGiftWrap async: seal encryption and signing delegates to
  signer when no local key available; outer wrap always uses ephemeral key
- Making UnwrapGiftWrap async: both decrypt layers delegate to signer
  when no local key; guard conditions allow processing with either
  local key or connected signer
- Removing NotSupportedException in PublishWelcomeAsync for signer users

All existing local-key functionality preserved. 158 tests pass (0 failures).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore: release v1.9.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add ONS Sense Check section — top-down market validation

Collapsible section below charts that validates bottom-up estimates
against ONS Living Costs & Food Survey data. Features:
- 252 searchable ONS expenditure categories with weekly spend data
- 192 local authorities with household counts for geographic filtering
- Demographic filters: age of HRP, income quintile, household composition
- Side-by-side comparison with visual gauge and interpretation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement two-tier toolkit system with general + specialized tools (#7)

* Add ui-ux-pro-max-skill toolkit to UI Builder agent (16)

Integrates the design intelligence toolkit from
github.com/nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill providing
161 industry-specific reasoning rules, 67 UI styles,
161 color palettes, 57 font pairings, 25 chart types,
and 99 UX guidelines for automated design system generation.


* Introduce two-tier toolkit system (general + specialized) with startup prompt

Adds a general toolkit shared across all 34 agents and keeps specialized
toolkits unique per agent. The toolkit-loader now merges both tiers at
load time, with specialized tools taking precedence on ID collision.

Key changes:
- general.index.yml: cross-cutting tools (gate-validator, dependency-direction-validator, changelog-template, github-search)
- toolkit-loader.js: new exports loadGeneralIndex, listGeneralTools, listMergedTools, loadMergedIndex
- agent-registry.js: uses loadMergedIndex for prompt building with two-tier explanation
- Orchestrator Phase 0: toolkit preference prompt (user-specified / auto-discover / hybrid)
- Discovery phase: toolkit discovery step with scout integration and staleness refresh
- Deduplicated tools from 5 agent indices now served via general toolkit
- config.yml: new toolkit section with merge_strategy and prompt_on_start settings
- 23 toolkit-loader tests + 10 agent-registry tests all passing

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor(tart): rewrite TestCloneWhenTart* using functional options (TDD-R3 Items 8-9)

Replace direct struct field assignment with functional options API (WithLookPath,

TestCloneWhenTartIsInstalled simplified to createTestClient(mock).

calls ensureInstalled() before runCommand, so the double-call wrapper was redundant.
